contexts.context: ..., and on the crupper there was a velvet <mark>cushion</mark>, that the soft Zoe might ride more gently...
...to-night at my home; there are satin <mark>cushions</mark> there, and we shall repose to-night under damask...
...by the winds, advanced with difficulty to a <mark>cushion</mark> placed at Monseigneur's feet. The rich dress,...
